name: frontend
description: Changes focused on the Next.js app or client-side UX.

name: backend
description: Changes focused on the Go API, services, or data layer.

name: api
description: OpenAPI contract, handlers, or request-response behavior.

name: e2e
description: Browser smoke tests or full-stack verification changes.

name: release
description: Release automation, publish flow, or changelog changes.

name: infra
description: Tooling, scripts, Docker, or environment setup changes.

name: chore
description: Maintenance work with little or no product impact.

name: enhancement
description: A reusable starter improvement or requested capability.
